    "Shackle is side-loaded, which significantly reduces its rated working load limit (WLL) and risks catastrophic failure."
  ],
  "actions": [
    "Stop the lifting operation immediately.",
    "Lower the load safely to the ground or secure it.",
    "Reconfigure the rigging using appropriate spacers, a collector ring, or a master link to ensure the shackle is loaded inline along its centerline."
  ],
  "rationale": "Side-loading a standard anchor or chain shackle drastically reduces its rated capacity (up to 50% at a 90-degree angle) and introduces bending moments it was not designed to withstand, violating safety standards and risking an dropped load.",
  "references": [
    "ASME B30.26 (Rigging Hardware)",
    "OSHA 1926.251 (Rigging Equipment for Material Handling)"
  ]
